company_info.address: Kasumigaseki Common Gate West Building 22nd Floor
company_info.description: Kasumigaseki Hotel REIT is Japan's first publicly listed REIT focused exclusively on hotels, sponsored by real estate developer Kasumigaseki Capital Co., Ltd. By leveraging the development and operational capabilities of the Kasumigaseki Capital Group, Kasumigaseki Hotel REIT aims to contribute to the advancement of Japan as a tourism nation, achieve sustainable growth, and enhance unitholder value through investments in multi-occupancy hotels across Japan, which are in short supply in the domestic hotel market. Kasumigaseki Hotel REIT aims to build a portfolio differentiated from other REITs by incorporating hotels with features that help address social challenges in Japan's tourism industry, such as locations across Japan with promising tourism-driven leisure demand, room types suitable for group accommodation, and operational efficiency through labor-saving operations.
